author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Starting comprehensive QA audit of the full codebase. Scope: (1) stubs/TODOs/unimplemented, (2) CPU fallbacks disguised as GPU impls, (3) panics that should be Results, (4) correctness bugs, (5) dead code. Will audit ferrotorch-core, ferrotorch-gpu, ferrotorch-nn, ferrotorch-optim systematically.
